headline: Agentic development tooling led the quarter while a cluster of new technique entrants opened across agent safety and neural rendering.
body: The quarter's rotation favored AI-assisted development techniques, with multi-session workflows, LLM integration, scoped skills, LSP, the PIV Loop, cache hit rate, and encrypted reasoning all moving together at matched momentum. The sharpest new entrants center on agent reliability, including the doer-judge framework, emergent behavior, role confusion, and primitive-action decomposition. Open-weight coding models advanced as GLM-5.2 surfaced as a free stealth model inside OpenCode, and Krea 2 brought local image generation with LoRA fine-tuning. A separate breakout in neural rendering and triangle splatting, alongside Discrete Hartley Transform and Green's functions, marked new graphics and numerical-methods activity.

cited_items.title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
